name: address
label: Street Address
description: A contact's street address, including apartment or unit #

name: annualrevenue
label: Annual Revenue
description: Annual company revenue

name: candidate_info
label: Candidate Info
description: Feel free to provide any additional information.

name: candidate_online_profile
label: Candidate Online Profile
description: LinkedIn or any other online profile

name: city
label: City
description: A contact's city of residence

name: closedate
label: Close Date
description: The date that a contact became a customer. This property is set automatically by HubSpot when a deal or opportunity is marked as closed-won. It can also be set manually or programmatically.

name: company
label: Company Name
description: The name of the contact's company. This is separate from the Name property of the contact's associated company and can be set independently.

name: company_size
label: Company size
description: A contact's company size. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

name: country
label: Country/Region
description: The contact's country/region of residence. This might be set via import, form, or integration.

name: createdate
label: Create Date
description: The date that a contact entered the system

name: currentlyinworkflow
label: Currently in workflow (discontinued)
description: If the contact is currently enrolled in any workflow

name: date_of_birth
label: Date of birth
description: A contact's date of birth. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

name: days_to_close
label: Days To Close
description: The days that elapsed from when a contact was created until they closed as a customer. This is set automatically by HubSpot and can be used for segmentation and reporting.

name: degree
label: Degree
description: A contact's degree. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced to via Lead Ads tool

name: email
label: Email
description: A contact's email address

name: engagements_last_meeting_booked
label: Date of last meeting booked in meetings tool
description: The date of the last meeting that has been scheduled by a contact through the meetings tool. If multiple meetings have been scheduled, the date of the last chronological meeting in the timeline is shown.

name: engagements_last_meeting_booked_campaign
label: Campaign of last booking in meetings tool
description: This UTM parameter shows which marketing campaign (e.g. a specific email) referred the contact to the meetings tool for their most recent booking. This property is only populated when you add tracking parameters to your meeting link.

name: engagements_last_meeting_booked_medium
label: Medium of last booking in meetings tool
description: This UTM parameter shows which channel (e.g. email) referred the contact to the meetings tool for their most recent booking. This property is only populated when you add tracking parameters to your meeting link.

name: engagements_last_meeting_booked_source
label: Source of last booking in meetings tool
description: This UTM parameter shows which site (e.g. Twitter) referred the contact to the meetings tool for their most recent booking. This property is only populated when you add tracking parameters to your meeting link.

name: fax
label: Fax Number
description: A contact's primary fax number

name: field_of_study
label: Field of study
description: A contact's field of study. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

name: first_conversion_date
label: First Conversion Date
description: The date this contact first submitted a form

name: first_conversion_event_name
label: First Conversion
description: The first form this contact submitted

name: first_deal_created_date
label: First Deal Created Date
description: The date the first deal for a contact was created. This is automatically set by HubSpot and can be used for segmentation and reporting.

name: firstname
label: First Name
description: A contact's first name

name: followercount
label: Follower Count
description: The number of Twitter followers a contact has

name: graduation_date
label: Graduation date
description: A contact's graduation date. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

name: hs_all_assigned_business_unit_ids
label: Brands
description: The brands this record is assigned to.

name: hs_analytics_average_page_views
label: Average Pageviews
description: The average number of pages a contact sees. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

name: hs_analytics_first_referrer
label: First Referring Site
description: The first website that referred a contact to your website. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

name: hs_analytics_first_timestamp
label: Time First Seen
description: The first time a contact has been seen. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

name: hs_analytics_first_touch_converting_campaign
label: First Touch Converting Campaign
description: The campaign responsible for the first touch creation of this contact

name: hs_analytics_first_url
label: First Page Seen
description: The first page a contact saw on your website. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

name: hs_analytics_first_visit_timestamp
label: Time of First Session
description: The first time a contact visited your website. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

name: hs_analytics_last_referrer
label: Last Referring Site
description: The last website that referred a contact to your website. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

name: hs_analytics_last_timestamp
label: Time Last Seen
description: The last time and date a contact has viewed a page on your website.

name: hs_analytics_last_touch_converting_campaign
label: Last Touch Converting Campaign
description: The campaign responsible for the last touch creation of this contact

name: hs_analytics_last_url
label: Last Page Seen
description: The last page a contact saw on your website. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

name: hs_analytics_last_visit_timestamp
label: Time of Last Session
description: The last time and date a contact visited your website.

name: hs_analytics_num_event_completions
label: Number of event completions
description: The sum of all events a contact has experienced. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

name: hs_analytics_num_page_views
label: Number of Pageviews
description: The sum of all pages a contact has seen on your website. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

name: hs_analytics_num_visits
label: Number of Sessions
description: The sum of all sessions a contact has made to your website. This is automatically set by HubSpot for each contact.

name: hs_analytics_revenue
label: Event Revenue
description: Event revenue can be set on a contact though HubSpot's enterprise Events. http://help.hubspot.com/articles/KCS_Article/Reports/How-do-I-create-Events-in-HubSpot

name: hs_analytics_source
label: Original Source
description: First known source the contact used to find your website. Set automatically, but may be updated manually.

name: hs_analytics_source_data_1
label: Original Source Drill-Down 1
description: Additional information about the source through which a contact first found your website. This property is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_analytics_source_data_2
label: Original Source Drill-Down 2
description: Additional information about the source through which a contact first found your website. This property is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_bing_click_id
label: Bing click id
description: The msclkid url parameter extracted from the Activity recorded when a visitor lands on a tracked webpage

name: hs_chat_assistant_iql_date
label: Chat Assistant IQL Date
description: Date that an automated chat assistant IQL was triggered based on chat intent

name: hs_chat_assistant_source
label: Chat Assistant Source
description: Which chat assistant the QL is being generated from

name: hs_chat_assistant_summary
label: Chat Assistant:Summary
description: AI-generated rich summary of a chat conversation when a customer expresses buying intent or requests to speak with Sales. Used to populate the Support Assistant QL card in the BDR prospecting workspace. This is populated by our HighIntentQlTool.

name: hs_contact_creation_legal_basis_source_instance_id
label: Contact creation legal basis source instance ID
description: The source instance responsible for creating this contact and determining the legal basis for processing

name: hs_contact_enrichment_opt_out_timestamp
label: Enrichment opt out timestamp
description: Timestamp of when the contact opted out of being included in the HubSpot Enrichment database

name: hs_content_membership_email
label: Member email
description: Email used to send private content information to members

name: hs_content_membership_email_confirmed
label: Email Confirmed
description: Email Confirmation status of user of Content Membership

name: hs_content_membership_follow_up_enqueued_at
label: Time enrolled in registration follow up emails
description: The time when the contact was first enrolled in the registration follow up email flow

name: hs_content_membership_notes
label: Membership Notes
description: The notes relating to the contact's content membership.

name: hs_content_membership_registered_at
label: Registered At
description: Datetime at which this user was set up for Content Membership

name: hs_content_membership_registration_domain_sent_to
label: Domain to which registration email was sent
description: Domain to which the registration invitation email for Content Membership was sent to

name: hs_content_membership_registration_email_sent_at
label: Time registration email was sent
description: Datetime at which this user was sent a registration invitation email for Content Membership

name: hs_content_membership_status
label: Status
description: The status of the contact's content membership.

name: hs_country_region_code
label: Country/Region Code
description: The contact's two-letter country code.

name: hs_created_by_user_id
label: Created by user ID
description: The user who created this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_current_customer
label: Current Customer
description: Indicates whether this record matches the portal's Current Customer filter criteria. Managed automatically by Customer Success Workspace.

name: hs_currently_enrolled_in_prospecting_agent
label: Currently Enrolled in Prospecting Agent
description: Indicates whether or not the contact has an active prospecting agent enrollment

name: hs_customer_agent_lead_status
label: Customer Agent Lead Status
description: The lead status determined by Customer Agent. This also indicates the level of qualification.

name: hs_email_bad_address
label: Invalid email address
description: The email address associated with this contact is invalid.

name: hs_email_bounce
label: Marketing emails bounced
description: The number of marketing emails that bounced for the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_click
label: Marketing emails clicked
description: The number of marketing emails which have had link clicks for the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_customer_quarantined_reason
label: Email address quarantine reason
description: The reason why the email address has been quarantined.

name: hs_email_delivered
label: Marketing emails delivered
description: The number of marketing emails delivered for the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_domain
label: Email Domain
description: A contact's email address domain

name: hs_email_first_click_date
label: First marketing email click date
description: The date of the earliest link click for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_first_open_date
label: First marketing email open date
description: The date of the earliest open for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_first_reply_date
label: First marketing email reply date
description: The date of the earliest reply for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_first_send_date
label: First marketing email send date
description: The date of the earliest delivery for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_hard_bounce_reason_enum
label: Email hard bounce reason
description: The issue that caused a contact to hard bounce from your emails. If this is an error or a temporary issue, you can unbounce this contact from the contact record.

name: hs_email_last_click_date
label: Last marketing email click date
description: The date of the most recent link click for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_last_email_name
label: Last marketing email name
description: The name of the last marketing email sent to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_last_open_date
label: Last marketing email open date
description: The date of the most recent open for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_last_reply_date
label: Last marketing email reply date
description: The date of the latest reply for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_last_send_date
label: Last marketing email send date
description: The date of the most recent delivery for any marketing email to the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_live_sourcing_restricted
label: Email live sourcing restricted
description: Denotes if the email property on this record has been restricted from having enrichment data sourced

name: hs_email_open
label: Marketing emails opened
description: The number of marketing emails opened for the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_optout
label: Unsubscribed from all email
description: Indicates that the current email address has opted out of all email.

name: hs_email_optout_256286686
label: Opted out of email: The Digication Blog Subscription
description: Indicates that the current email address has opted out of this email type.

name: hs_email_optout_778636986
label: Opted out of email: OAIR
description: Indicates that the current email address has opted out of this email type.

name: hs_email_optout_8496199
label: Opted out of email: Marketing Information
description: Indicates that the current email address has opted out of this email type.

name: hs_email_optout_8498307
label: Opted out of email: One to One
description: Indicates that the current email address has opted out of this email type.

name: hs_email_optout_9298852
label: Opted out of email: Make Learning Visible Subscription
description: Indicates that the current email address has opted out of this email type.

name: hs_email_quarantined
label: Email Address Quarantined
description: Indicates that the current email address has been quarantined for anti-abuse reasons and any marketing email sends to it will be blocked. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_quarantined_reason
label: Email address automated quarantine reason
description: The automated reason why the email address has been quarantined.

name: hs_email_replied
label: Marketing emails replied
description: The number of marketing emails replied to by the current email address. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_sends_since_last_engagement
label: Sends Since Last Engagement
description: The number of marketing emails that have been sent to the current email address since the last engagement (open or link click). This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_email_type
label: Email type
description: Used to determine if a given property is a personal email or work email

name: hs_emailconfirmationstatus
label: Marketing email confirmation status
description: The status of a contact's eligibility to receive marketing email. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_employment_change_detected_date
label: Employment change detected date
description: Date contact confirmed no longer employed at current company

name: hs_enriched_email_bounce_detected
label: Enriched Email Bounce Detected (Deprecated)
description: Bounce Detected attribute is no longer being populated/updated after 10/31/2025. In order to receive signals about an email address becoming undeliverable or no longer valid for the contact, please use Intent Signals.

name: hs_feedback_last_csat_survey_date
label: Last CSAT survey date
description: The time that this contact last submitted a CSAT survey response. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_feedback_last_csat_survey_follow_up
label: Last CSAT survey comment
description: Last CSAT survey comment from this contact.

name: hs_feedback_last_csat_survey_rating
label: Last CSAT survey rating
description: Last CSAT survey rating from this contact.

name: hs_feedback_last_nps_follow_up
label: Last NPS survey comment
description: Last NPS survey comment that this contact gave

name: hs_feedback_last_nps_rating
label: Last NPS survey rating
description: Last NPS survey rating that this contact gave

name: hs_feedback_last_nps_rating_number
label: Latest NPS survey rating
description: Latest NPS survey rating that this contact gave

name: hs_feedback_last_survey_date
label: Last NPS survey date
description: The time that this contact last submitted a NPS survey response. This is automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_first_closed_order_id
label: First Closed Order ID
description: The id of the associated order that was first to be closed

name: hs_first_engagement_object_id
label: ID of first engagement
description: The object id of the current contact owner's first engagement with the contact.

name: hs_first_order_closed_date
label: First Order Closed Date
description: Date first order was closed. Set Automatically

name: hs_gps_error
label: GPS Error
description: Specifies any errors that may have occurred while geocoding a contact.

name: hs_inferred_language_codes
label: Inferred Language Codes
description: Inferred languages based on location.  ISO 639-1

name: hs_intent_signals_enabled
label: Intent Signals active
description: Indicates whether intent signal tracking is currently active for this record

name: hs_ip_timezone
label: IP Timezone
description: The timezone reported by a contact's IP address. This is automatically set by HubSpot and can be used for segmentation and reporting.

name: hs_is_enriched
label: Has been enriched
description: Indicates whether this object has ever had enriched properties written to it.

name: hs_is_unworked
label: Contact unworked
description: Contact has not been assigned or has not been engaged after last owner assignment/re-assignment

name: hs_job_change_detected_date
label: Job change detected date
description: Date contact confirmed no longer employed at current company

name: hs_journey_stage
label: Journey Stage
description: Track the status of a contact through a customer journey. It can be set through journeys, manually on a per contact basis, and through other tools.

name: hs_language
label: Preferred language
description: Set your contact's preferred language for communications. This property can be changed from an import, form, or integration.

name: hs_last_sales_activity_timestamp
label: Last Engagement Date
description: The last time a contact engaged with your site or a form, document, meetings link, or tracked email. This doesn't include marketing emails or emails to multiple contacts.

name: hs_latest_disqualified_lead_date
label: Latest Disqualified Lead Date
description: The most recent time at which an associated lead currently in a disqualified stage was moved to that stage

name: hs_latest_open_lead_date
label: Latest Open Lead Date
description: The most recent time an associated open lead was moved to a NEW or IN_PROGRESS state

name: hs_latest_qualified_lead_date
label: Latest Qualified Lead Date
description: The most recent time at which an associated lead currently in a qualified stage was moved to that stage

name: hs_latest_sequence_ended_date
label: Last sequence ended date
description: The last sequence ended date.

name: hs_latest_sequence_enrolled
label: Last sequence enrolled
description: The last sequence enrolled.

name: hs_latest_sequence_enrolled_date
label: Last sequence enrolled date
description: The last sequence enrolled date.

name: hs_latest_source
label: Latest Traffic Source
description: The source of the latest session for a contact

name: hs_latest_source_data_1
label: Latest Traffic Source Drill-Down 1
description: Additional information about the latest source for the last session the contact used to find your website. Set automatically.

name: hs_latest_source_data_2
label: Latest Traffic Source Drill-Down 2
description: Additional information about the source for the last session the contact used to find your website. Set automatically.

name: hs_latest_source_timestamp
label: Latest Traffic Source Date
description: The time of the latest session for a contact

name: hs_latitude
label: Latitude
description: A contact's latitude

name: hs_lead_status
label: Lead Status
description: The contact's sales, prospecting or outreach status

name: hs_legal_basis
label: Legal basis for processing contact's data
description: Legal basis for processing contact's data; 'Not applicable' will exempt the contact from GDPR protections

name: hs_linkedin_click_id
label: LinkedIn click id
description: The li_fat_id url parameter extracted from the Activity recorded when a visitor lands on a tracked webpage

name: hs_linkedin_url
label: LinkedIn URL
description: The URL of the contact's LinkedIn page.

name: hs_longitude
label: Longitude
description: A contact's longitude

name: hs_marketable_reason_id
label: Marketing contact status source name
description: The ID of the activity that set the contact as a marketing contact

name: hs_marketable_reason_type
label: Marketing contact status source type
description: The type of the activity that set the contact as a marketing contact

name: hs_marketable_status
label: Marketing contact status
description: The marketing status of a contact

name: hs_marketable_until_renewal
label: Marketing contact until next update
description: Specifies if this contact will be set as non-marketing on renewal

name: hs_membership_has_accessed_private_content
label: Member has accessed private content
description: 1 if a member has accessed any private content, 0 or null if not

name: hs_membership_last_private_content_access_date
label: Membership last private content access date
description: The last date a contact accessed private content

name: hs_merged_object_ids
label: Merged Contact IDs
description: The list of Contact record IDs that have been merged into this Contact. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_object_id
label: Record ID
description: The unique ID for this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_object_source_detail_1
label: Record source detail 1
description: First level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_2
label: Record source detail 2
description: Second level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_3
label: Record source detail 3
description: Third level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_label
label: Record source
description: How this record was created.

name: hs_persona
label: Persona
description: A contact's persona

name: hs_predictivecontactscore
label: Predictive Lead Score
description: A score calculated by HubSpot that represents a contact's likelihood to become a customer

name: hs_predictivecontactscore_v2
label: Likelihood to close
description: The probability that a contact will become a customer within the next 90 days. This score is based on standard contact properties and behavior.

name: hs_predictivecontactscorebucket
label: Lead Rating
description: The rating of this contact based on their predictive lead score

name: hs_predictivescoringtier
label: Contact priority
description: A ranking system of contacts evenly assigned into four tiers. Contacts in tier one are more likely to become customers than contacts in tier four.

name: hs_prospecting_agent_last_enrolled
label: Prospecting Agent Last Enrolled
description: The last time the Prospecting Agent enrolled this contact

name: hs_quarantined_emails
label: Quarantined Emails
description: Lists all emails associated with this contact that have been quarantined, with a source and reason.

name: hs_recent_closed_order_date
label: Recent Closed Order Date
description: Date last order was closed. Set automatically.

name: hs_registered_member
label: Registered member
description: Whether or not a contact is registered

name: hs_registration_method
label: Registration Method
description: The method used for registration

name: hs_returning_to_office_detected_date
label: Returning to office detected date
description: Date detected from email that contact will return to the office

name: hs_role
label: Employment Role
description: Job role

name: hs_sa_first_engagement_date
label: Date of first engagement
description: The date the current contact owner first engaged with the contact.

name: hs_sa_first_engagement_descr
label: Description of first engagement
description: A description of the current contact owner's first engagement with the contact.

name: hs_sa_first_engagement_object_type
label: Type of first engagement
description: The object type of the current contact owner's first engagement with the contact.

name: hs_sales_email_last_clicked
label: Recent Sales Email Clicked Date
description: The last time a tracked sales email was clicked by this user

name: hs_sales_email_last_opened
label: Recent Sales Email Opened Date
description: The last time a tracked sales email was opened by this contact. This property does not update for emails that were sent to more than one contact.

name: hs_sales_email_last_replied
label: Recent Sales Email Replied Date
description: The most recent email from this contact that was received and logged by HubSpot. This value is automatically set by HubSpot and may not be modified.

name: hs_seniority
label: Employment Seniority
description: Job Seniority

name: hs_sequences_enrolled_count
label: Number of sequences enrolled
description: The number of sequences enrolled.

name: hs_sequences_is_enrolled
label: Currently in Sequence
description: A yes/no field that indicates whether the contact is currently in a Sequence.

name: hs_shared_team_ids
label: Shared teams
description: Additional teams whose users can access the Contact based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows or APIs.

name: hs_shared_user_ids
label: Shared users
description: Additional users that can access the Contact based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows and APIs.

name: hs_social_facebook_clicks
label: Facebook Clicks
description: The number clicks on links shared on Facebook

name: hs_social_google_plus_clicks
label: Google Plus Clicks
description: The number clicks on links shared on Google Plus

name: hs_social_last_engagement
label: Most Recent Social Click
description: The date of the most recent click on a published social message. This is set automatically by HubSpot for each contact.

name: hs_social_linkedin_clicks
label: LinkedIn Clicks
description: The number clicks on links shared on LinkedIn

name: hs_social_num_broadcast_clicks
label: Broadcast Clicks
description: The number of clicks on published social messages. This is set automatically by HubSpot for each contact.

name: hs_social_twitter_clicks
label: Twitter Clicks
description: The number of times a contact clicked on links you shared on Twitter through HubSpot. This is set automatically by HubSpot and can be used for segmentation.

name: hs_state_code
label: State/Region Code
description: The contact's state or region code.

name: hs_sub_role
label: Employment Sub Role
description: Job sub role

name: hs_tiktok_click_id
label: TikTok click id
description: The ttclid url parameter extracted from the Activity recorded when a visitor lands on a tracked webpage

name: hs_time_between_contact_creation_and_deal_close
label: Time between contact creation and deal close

name: hs_time_between_contact_creation_and_deal_creation
label: Time between contact creation and deal creation

name: hs_time_to_first_engagement
label: Lead response time
description: The time it took the current owner to perform a qualifying action on the contact. Qualifying actions include sending an email, calling, using chat, recording a meeting outcome, or marking a task as in progress or completed.

name: hs_time_to_move_from_lead_to_customer
label: Time to move from lead to customer
description: How long it takes for a contact to move from the HubSpot lead stage to the HubSpot customer stage.

name: hs_time_to_move_from_marketingqualifiedlead_to_customer
label: Time to move from marketing qualified lead to customer
description: How long it takes for a contact to move from the HubSpot marketing qualified lead stage to the HubSpot customer stage.

name: hs_time_to_move_from_opportunity_to_customer
label: Time to move from opportunity to customer
description: How long it takes for a contact to move from the HubSpot opportunity stage to the HubSpot customer stage.

name: hs_time_to_move_from_salesqualifiedlead_to_customer
label: Time to move from sales qualified lead to customer
description: How long it takes for a contact to move from the HubSpot sales qualified lead stage to the HubSpot customer stage.

name: hs_time_to_move_from_subscriber_to_customer
label: Time to move from subscriber to customer
description: How long it takes for a contact to move from the HubSpot subscriber stage to the HubSpot customer stage.

name: hs_timezone
label: Time Zone
description: The contact’s time zone. This can be set automatically by HubSpot based on other contact properties. It can also be set manually for each contact.

name: hs_updated_by_user_id
label: Updated by user ID
description: The user who last updated this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_v2_cumulative_time_in_customer
label: Cumulative time in "Customer (Lifecycle Stage Pipeline)"
description: The cumulative time in seconds spent by the contact in the 'Customer' stage, 'Lifecycle Stage Pipeline' pipeline

name: hs_v2_cumulative_time_in_evangelist
label: Cumulative time in "Evangelist (Lifecycle Stage Pipeline)"
description: The cumulative time in seconds spent by the contact in the 'Evangelist' stage, 'Lifecycle Stage Pipeline' pipeline

name: hs_v2_cumulative_time_in_lead
label: Cumulative time in "Lead (Lifecycle Stage Pipeline)"
description: The cumulative time in seconds spent by the contact in the 'Lead' stage, 'Lifecycle Stage Pipeline' pipeline

name: hs_v2_cumulative_time_in_marketingqualifiedlead
label: Cumulative time in "Marketing Qualified Lead (Lifecycle Stage Pipeline)"
description: The cumulative time in seconds spent by the contact in the 'Marketing Qualified Lead' stage, 'Lifecycle Stage Pipeline' pipeline

name: hs_v2_time_in_current_stage
label: Time in current stage
description: The time this object has spent in the current pipeline stage

name: hs_whatsapp_phone_number
label: WhatsApp Phone Number
description: The phone number associated with the contact’s WhatsApp account.

name: hubspot_owner_assigneddate
label: Owner assigned date
description: The most recent timestamp of when an owner was assigned to this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hubspot_owner_id
label: Contact owner
description: The owner of a contact. This can be any HubSpot user or Salesforce integration user, and can be set manually or via Workflows.

name: hubspot_team_id
label: HubSpot Team
description: The team of the owner of a contact.

name: hubspotscore
label: HubSpot Score
description: The number that shows qualification of contacts to sales readiness. It can be set in HubSpot's Lead Scoring app.

name: industry
label: Industry
description: The industry a contact is in

name: ip_city
label: IP City
description: The city reported by a contact's IP address. This is automatically set by HubSpot and can be used for segmentation and reporting.

name: ip_country
label: IP Country
description: The country reported by a contact's IP address. This is automatically set by HubSpot and can be used for segmentation and reporting.

name: ip_country_code
label: IP Country Code
description: The country code reported by a contact's IP address. This is automatically set by HubSpot and can be used for segmentation and reporting.

name: ip_state
label: IP State/Region
description: The state or region reported by a contact's IP address. This is automatically set by HubSpot and can be used for segmentation and reporting.

name: ip_state_code
label: IP State Code/Region Code
description: The state code or region code reported by a contact's IP address. This is automatically set by HubSpot and can be used for segmentation and reporting.

name: job_function
label: Job function
description: A contact's job function. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

name: jobtitle
label: Job Title
description: A contact's job title

name: kloutscoregeneral
label: Klout Score
description: A contact's Klout score, a measure of Internet influence

name: lastmodifieddate
label: Last Modified Date
description: The date any property on this contact was modified

name: lastname
label: Last Name
description: A contact's last name

name: lifecyclestage
label: Lifecycle Stage
description: The qualification of contacts to sales readiness. It can be set through imports, forms, workflows, and manually on a per contact basis.

name: linkedinbio
label: LinkedIn Bio
description: A contact's LinkedIn bio

name: linkedinconnections
label: LinkedIn Connections
description: How many LinkedIn connections they have

name: marital_status
label: Marital Status
description: A contact's marital status. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

name: message
label: Message
description: A default property to be used for any message or comments a contact may want to leave on a form.

name: military_status
label: Military status
description: A contact's military status. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

name: mobilephone
label: Mobile Phone Number
description: A contact's mobile phone number

name: notes_last_contacted
label: Last Contacted
description: The last time a call, email, or meeting was logged for a contact. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the contact record.

name: notes_last_updated
label: Last Activity Date
description: The last time a note, call, email, meeting, or task was logged for a contact. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the contact record.

name: notes_next_activity_date
label: Next Activity Date
description: The date of the next upcoming activity for a contact. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the contact record.

name: num_associated_deals
label: Number of Associated Deals
description: The number of deals associated with this contact. This is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: num_contacted_notes
label: Number of times contacted
description: The number of times a call, email, or meeting was logged for a contact. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the contact record.

name: num_conversion_events
label: Number of Form Submissions
description: The number of forms this contact has submitted

name: num_notes
label: Number of Sales Activities
description: The number of sales activities for a contact. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the contact record.

name: num_unique_conversion_events
label: Number of Unique Forms Submitted
description: The number of different forms this contact has submitted

name: numemployees
label: Number of Employees
description: The number of company employees

name: owneremail
label: HubSpot Owner Email (legacy)
description: A legacy property used to identify the email address of the owner of the contact. This property is no longer in use.

name: ownername
label: HubSpot Owner Name (legacy)
description: A legacy property used to identify the name of the owner of the contact. This property is no longer in use.

name: phone
label: Phone Number
description: A contact's primary phone number

name: preferred_name
label: Preferred name
description: Include title, such as "Dr. Martin"

name: recent_conversion_date
label: Recent Conversion Date
description: The date this contact last submitted a form

name: recent_conversion_event_name
label: Recent Conversion
description: The last form this contact submitted

name: recent_deal_amount
label: Recent Deal Amount
description: The amount of the last closed won deal associated with a contact. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on information from the Deals object.

name: recent_deal_close_date
label: Recent Deal Close Date
description: The date that the last deal associated with a contact was won. This is automatically set by HubSpot based on information from the Deals object.

name: relationship_status
label: Relationship Status
description: A contact's relationship status. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

name: salutation
label: Salutation
description: The title used to address a contact

name: school
label: School
description: A contact's school. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

name: seniority
label: Seniority
description: A contact's seniority. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

name: start_date
label: Start date
description: A contact's start date. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

name: state
label: State/Region
description: The contact's state of residence. This might be set via import, form, or integration.

name: submission_date
label: Submission date
description: Recruiter submission date

name: total_revenue
label: Total Revenue
description: The sum from all closed won deal revenue associated with a contact. This is automatically set by HubSpot and can be used for segmentation and reporting.

name: twitterbio
label: Twitter Bio
description: The contact's Twitter bio. This is set by HubSpot using the contact's email address.

name: twitterhandle
label: Twitter Username
description: The contact's Twitter handle.

name: twitterprofilephoto
label: Twitter Profile Photo
description: The contact's Twitter profile photo. This is set by HubSpot using the contact's email address.

name: vip_group
label: VIP Group
description: Contacts suitable for special program, such as Digi Scholars, BLM, case studies, etc

name: website
label: Website URL
description: The contact's company website

name: where_did_you_find_this_candidate_
label: Where did you find this candidate?
description: Personal contact, company database, LinkedIn, etc. Please provide details.

name: work_email
label: Work email
description: A contact's work email. This property is required for the Facebook Ads Integration. This property will be automatically synced via the Lead Ads tool

name: zip
label: Postal Code
description: The contact's zip code. This might be set via import, form, or integration.

name: zoom_webinar_attendance_average_duration
label: Average Zoom webinar attendance duration
description: The average amount of time this contact attends your Zoom webinars. 100% would mean the contact stays until the end of each Zoom webinar they attend.

name: zoom_webinar_attendance_count
label: Total number of Zoom webinars attended
description: Total number of Zoom webinars this contact has attended.

name: zoom_webinar_joinlink
label: Last registered Zoom webinar
description: The name of the last Zoom webinar this contact registered for. This property is updated every time they register for a new Zoom webinar.

name: zoom_webinar_registration_count
label: Total number of Zoom webinar registrations
description: Total number of Zoom webinars this contact has registered for.
